subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the dwellers of earth and heaven are seized with trembling, inasmuch as the Beloved hath come without veil or concealment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه اخذ الاهتزاز سکان الارض و السماء بما اتی المحبوب من غیر ستر و
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
